riskAdjusted.label: Risk-Adjusted Optimal
riskAdjusted.description: Selected from the historical replay frontier at the highest zero-rate Sharpe ratio under continuous sizing.
riskAdjusted.optimization_objective: Maximum zero-rate Sharpe ratio on the historical replay frontier

aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Selected from the same replay frontier at a higher-return, higher-volatility point than the tangency choice.
aggressive.optimization_objective: Higher-return point on the historical replay frontier than the tangency solution

capitalPreservation.label: Capital Preservation
capitalPreservation.description: Selected from replay to minimize downside volatility and drawdown while maintaining a positive realized return.
capitalPreservation.optimization_objective: Minimum downside volatility and drawdown among positive-return conservative replay candidates

strategy_optimization.method: Historical replay candidate sweep with efficient-frontier tangency selection
